name: Wembley Stadium
tagline: A national stadium setup with heavy pre-kickoff surges and wide concourse circulation.

scheduleTemplate.title: Turnstiles Open
scheduleTemplate.desc: Security and arrival begin along the outer concourse and Olympic Way.

scheduleTemplate.title: Warmups
scheduleTemplate.desc: Pre-match warmups and concourse movement build before kickoff.

scheduleTemplate.title: Kickoff
scheduleTemplate.desc: Stands settle quickly after the opening whistle.

scheduleTemplate.title: Halftime
scheduleTemplate.desc: Short, intense food and restroom rush across every level.

scheduleTemplate.title: Second Half
scheduleTemplate.desc: Crowd flow returns to seating sections for restart.

scheduleTemplate.title: Full Time (Est.)
scheduleTemplate.desc: Post-match ceremonies, interviews, and announcement window.

scheduleTemplate.title: Managed Egress
scheduleTemplate.desc: Exit guidance begins toward rail, bus, and rideshare corridors.

accessibility.title: Accessible Routes
accessibility.desc: Step-free routes are available from the main approach, with lift access to upper seating levels and steward assistance on request.

accessibility.title: Hearing Support
accessibility.desc: Hearing assistance points and induction loop support are available at guest services and key hospitality lounges.

accessibility.title: Visual & Sensory Support
accessibility.desc: Sensory guidance and dedicated support staff can be reached through guest services near the main concourse.

accessibility.title: Accessible Seating
accessibility.desc: Accessible viewing positions and companion seating are distributed throughout the bowl with accessible restroom access nearby.

services.firstAidPrompt: Where is the nearest first aid point in Wembley Stadium right now?
services.lostFoundPrompt: How do I report a lost item at Wembley Stadium?
services.transportPrompt: What is the best transport exit strategy from Wembley Stadium after the event?
services.firstAidInfo: Guest medical assistance is coordinated near the main concourse and pitch-side response positions.
services.lostFoundInfo: Lost property is routed through guest services and stadium operations after events.
services.transportInfo: Wembley Park station, bus corridors, and rideshare pickup points all surge after full time, so staggered exit is the fastest strategy.

emergency.exitMessage: Follow steward instructions and avoid crowding Olympic Way immediately after the event.
